title: Golf ball components formed from hydroxyurethane compositions
abstract: Thermoplastic and thermoset compositions including hydroxyurethane linkages, golf ball components formed using such thermoplastic or thermoset compositions, and golf balls including such golf components.
claims: 1. A golf ball, comprising: a core; and a cover, wherein the cover is formed from a composition comprising hydroxyurethane linkages and urethane linkages, and wherein the composition comprises a first reaction product of at least one cyclic carbonate and at least one amine-terminated component and a second reaction product of an isocyanate-containing component and an isocyanate-reactive component.
